requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety for Solar PV Inverters — SLSI Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器安全——IEC 62109 / SLSI基线
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器安全——IEC 62109 / SLSI基線

summary.en: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) adopts IEC standards as the technical baseline for electrical and power-electronics equipment. For solar PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (particular requirements for inverters) represent the expected safety standard. SLSI may require product registration or conformity evidence from recognised testing bodies before importation and sale; importers should confirm the current SLSI type-approval or registration requirement for PV inverters with SLSI before shipment.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡标准局（SLSI）采用IEC标准作为电气和电力电子设备的技术基线。对于光伏逆变器，IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器专用要求）为预期的安全标准。SLSI可能要求进口和销售前提供认可检测机构的产品注册或符合性证据；进口商在出货前应向SLSI确认当前光伏逆变器型式批准或注册要求。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡標準局（SLSI）採用IEC標準作為電氣和電力電子設備的技術基線。對於光伏逆變器，IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器專用要求）為預期的安全標準。SLSI可能要求進口和銷售前提供認可檢測機構的產品注冊或符合性證據；進口商在出貨前應向SLSI確認當前光伏逆變器型式批准或注冊要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1: Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2: Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SLSI type-approval or registration requirements for electrical equipment

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 37408-2019 (photovoltaic inverter technical requirements) and NB/T 32004-2018 for photovoltaic inverter testing. These Chinese standards have partial technical alignment with IEC 62109 but are not equivalent certifications and are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62109 test evidence in Sri Lanka.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 37408-2019（光伏逆变器技术要求）和NB/T 32004-2018进行光伏逆变器检测。这些中国标准与IEC 62109有部分技术对应，但不构成等效认证，不能在斯里兰卡替代IEC 62109测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 37408-2019（光伏逆變器技術要求）和NB/T 32004-2018進行光伏逆變器檢測。這些中國標準與IEC 62109有部分技術對應，但不構成等效認證，不能在斯里蘭卡替代IEC 62109測試證據。

gap.en: Chinese GB/T inverter test reports do not substitute for IEC 62109 test evidence recognised by SLSI. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory, confirm SLSI registration or type-approval status for PV inverters before shipment, and prepare bilingual (English/Sinhala or English/Tamil) product documentation as required.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T逆变器检测报告不能替代SLSI认可的IEC 62109测试证据。出口商应从国际认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告，出货前向SLSI确认光伏逆变器注册或型式批准状态，并按要求准备双语（英语/僧伽罗语或英语/泰米尔语）产品文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T逆變器檢測報告不能替代SLSI認可的IEC 62109測試證據。出口商應從國際認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告，出貨前向SLSI確認光伏逆變器注冊或型式批准狀態，並按要求準備雙語（英語/僧伽羅語或英語/泰米爾語）產品文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SLSI type-approval or registration applies to PV inverters; IEC 62109 is the technical standard baseline
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T 37408-2019); NB/T 32004-2018 is a sector standard for inverter testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese GB/T inverter test report does not satisfy SLSI or IEC 62109 requirements. Confirm SLSI registration requirements and obtain IEC 62109-1/62109-2 test evidence from an accredited laboratory before shipment to Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T逆变器测试报告不满足SLSI或IEC 62109要求。出货斯里兰卡前，需确认SLSI注册要求并从认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/62109-2测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T逆變器測試報告不滿足SLSI或IEC 62109要求。出貨斯里蘭卡前，需確認SLSI注冊要求並從認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/62109-2測試證據。
